From ShiftReset Require ExamplesEnt.
Local Open Scope string_scope.

Module Multi.

(* < sh k. let a = k true in let b = k false in a && b > *)
Definition flip1 : ufun := fun _ =>
  rs (
    sh "k" (
      bind (unk "k" true) (fun r1 =>
      bind (unk "k" false) (fun r2 =>
        discard "k";; ens (fun r => \[r = vand r1 r2])
      )))).


forall v1 : val, flip1 v1 ⊑ ens r. \[r = false]


forall v1 : val, flip1 v1 ⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
flip1 v1 ⊑ ens r. \[r = false]
 
v1: val
rs
  (sh "k"
     (let r1 = unk "k" true
      in let r2 = unk "k" false
         in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
rs
  (let r1 = unk "k" true
   in let r2 = unk "k" false
      in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
rs
  (let r1 = rs (ens r. \[r = true])
   in let r2 = unk "k" false
      in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]
 
v1: val
defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
rs
  (let r2 = unk "k" false
   in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand true r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
rs
  (let r2 = rs (ens r. \[r = false])
   in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand true r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]
 
v1: val
defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
rs (discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand true false]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
rs (ens r. \[r = vand true false])
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]
 
v1: val
ens r. \[r = vand true false] ⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  reflexivity.
Qed.

(* this shows how [flip_reduction1] works *)

forall v1 : val, flip1 v1 ⊑ ens r. \[r = false]


forall v1 : val, flip1 v1 ⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

flip1 v1 ⊑ ens r. \[r = false]
 
v1: val
rs
  (sh "k"
     (let r1 = unk "k" true
      in let r2 = unk "k" false
         in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
rs
  (let r1 = unk "k" true
   in let r2 = unk "k" false
      in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
rs
  (defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
   let r1 = unk "k" true
   in let r2 = unk "k" false
      in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
rs
  (let r1 =
   defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
   unk "k" true
   in let r2 = unk "k" false
      in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
rs
  (let r1 =
   defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
   rs (ens r. \[r = true])
   in let r2 = unk "k" false
      in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
rs
  (let r1 =
   rs
     (defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
      (ens r. \[r = true]))
   in let r2 = unk "k" false
      in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
rs
  (let r = rs (ens r. \[r = true])
   in defun "k"
        (fun v : val => rs (ens r0. \[r0 = v]));;
      let r2 = unk "k" false
      in discard "k";; (ens r0. \[r0 = vand r r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]


  
v1: val
rs
  (let r = ens r. \[r = true]
   in defun "k"
        (fun v : val => rs (ens r0. \[r0 = v]));;
      let r2 = unk "k" false
      in discard "k";; (ens r0. \[r0 = vand r r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
rs
  (defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
   let r2 = unk "k" false
   in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand true r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]


  
v1: val
rs
  (let r2 =
   defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
   unk "k" false
   in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand true r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
rs
  (let r2 =
   defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
   rs (ens r. \[r = false])
   in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand true r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
rs
  (let r2 =
   rs
     (defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
      (ens r. \[r = false]))
   in discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand true r2]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
rs
  (let r = rs (ens r. \[r = false])
   in defun "k"
        (fun v : val => rs (ens r0. \[r0 = v]));;
      discard "k";; (ens r0. \[r0 = vand true r]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
rs
  (let r = ens r. \[r = false]
   in defun "k"
        (fun v : val => rs (ens r0. \[r0 = v]));;
      discard "k";; (ens r0. \[r0 = vand true r]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
rs
  (defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
   discard "k";; (ens r. \[r = vand true false]))
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]


  
v1: val
rs (ens r. \[r = vand true false])
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  
v1: val
ens r. \[r = vand true false] ⊑ ens r. \[r = false]

  reflexivity.
Qed.

End Multi.

Module Toss.

(* let toss () =
  shift k.
    x := !x+1;
    let r1 = k true in
    x := !x+1;
    let r2 = k false in
    r1 + r2
*)
Definition toss1 : ufun := fun _ =>
  sh "k" (∀ x a,
    bind (req (x~~>vint a) (ens_ (x~~>(a+1));; unk "k" true)) (fun r1 =>
      ∀ b, bind (req (x~~>vint b) (ens_ (x~~>(b+1));; unk "k" false)) (fun r2 =>
        discard "k";;
        ens (fun r3 => \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))).

(* let flipi () = < let v = toss () in if v then 0 else 0 > *)
Definition flipi1 : flow :=
  rs (
    bind (unk "toss" vunit) (fun v =>
    ens (fun r1 => \[If v = true then r1 = 1 else r1 = 0]))
  ).


(forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a) ->
flipi1 ⊑ ExamplesEnt.Toss.flipi_spec


(forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a) ->
flipi1 ⊑ ExamplesEnt.Toss.flipi_spec

  
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
flipi1 ⊑ ExamplesEnt.Toss.flipi_spec

  
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
rs
  (let v = unk "toss" vunit
   in (ens r1. \[If v = true then r1 = 1 else r1 = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a) (ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1])

  
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
rs
  (let v = toss1 vunit
   in (ens r1. \[If v = true then r1 = 1 else r1 = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a) (ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1])
 
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
rs
  (let v =
   sh "k"
     (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
        let r1 =
        req (x ~~> a)
          (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
        in (∀ b : int,
              let r2 =
              req (x ~~> b)
                (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
              in discard "k";;
                 (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
   in (ens r1. \[If v = true then r1 = 1 else r1 = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a) (ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1])

defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in (ens r1. \[If v0 = true then r1 = 1
                    else r1 = 0])));;
rs
  (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
     let r1 =
     req (x ~~> a)
       (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
     in (∀ b : int,

⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a) (ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1])

   rs
     (let v0 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in (ens r1. \[If v0 = true then r1 = 1
                    else r1 = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1 + 1));;
rs (discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd 1 0]))
⊑ ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1]

  
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
C0: false <> true
ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1 + 1));;
rs (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd 1 0])
⊑ ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1]

  
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
C0: false <> true
ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1 + 1));; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd 1 0])
⊑ ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1]

  
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
C0: false <> true
ens x0. \[x0 = vadd 1 0] \* x ~~> (a + 1 + 1)
⊑ ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1]

  
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
C0: false <> true
(fun x0 : val => \[x0 = vadd 1 0] \* x ~~> (a + 1 + 1)) ===>
(fun r : val => x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1])

  
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
C0: false <> true
forall r : val, r = vadd 1 0 -> a + 1 + 1 = a + 2
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
C0: false <> true
forall r : val, r = vadd 1 0 -> r = 1

  
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
C0: false <> true
forall r : val, r = vadd 1 0 -> a + 1 + 1 = a + 2
 
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
C0: false <> true
r: val
H: r = vadd 1 0
a + 1 + 1 = a + 2
 
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
C0: false <> true
r: val
H: r = vadd 1 0
a + 1 + 1 = a + 2
 math.
  
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
C0: false <> true
forall r : val, r = vadd 1 0 -> r = 1
 
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
C0: false <> true
r: val
H: r = vadd 1 0
r = 1
 
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
C0: false <> true
r: val
H: r = 1 + 0
r = 1
 
Htoss: forall a : val, unk "toss" a ⊑ toss1 a
x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
C0: false <> true
r: val
H: r = 1 + 0
1 + 0 = 1
 f_equal.
Qed.

(* let toss_n n =
  if n = 0 then
    true
  else
    let r1 = toss () in
    let r2 = toss_n (n - 1) in
    r1 && r2 *)
Definition toss_n1 : ufun := fun (n:val) =>
  (disj
    (ens (fun r => \[r = true /\ veq n 0]))
    (ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
      bind (toss1 vunit) (fun r1 =>
      bind (unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)) (fun r2 =>
      ens (fun r => \[r = vand r1 r2]))))).


forall (P : val -> Prop) (fk : val -> flow)
  (f1 : flow) (f : var) (u : val -> flow) (H : hprop),
(forall r : val,
 P r -> defun f u;; ens_ H;; rs (fk r) ⊑ f1) ->
defun f u;;
ens_ H;; rs (let x = ens r. \[P r] in fk x) ⊑ f1


forall (P : val -> Prop) (fk : val -> flow)
  (f1 : flow) (f : var) (u : val -> flow) (H : hprop),
(forall r : val,
 P r -> defun f u;; ens_ H;; rs (fk r) ⊑ f1) ->
defun f u;;
ens_ H;; rs (let x = ens r. \[P r] in fk x) ⊑ f1

  
forall (P : val -> Prop) (fk : val -> flow)
  (f1 : flow) (f : var) (u : val -> flow) (H : hprop),
(forall r : val,
 P r ->
 forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (defun f u;; ens_ H;; rs (fk r)) ->
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f1) ->
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (defun f u;;
    ens_ H;; rs (let x = ens r. \[P r] in fk x)) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f1
 
P: val -> Prop
fk: val -> flow
f1: flow
f: var
u: val -> flow
H: hprop
H0: forall r : val,
P r ->
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (defun f u;; ens_ H;; rs (fk r)) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f1
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H1: s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (defun f u;;
    ens_ H;; rs (let x = ens r. \[P r] in fk x))
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f1

  
P: val -> Prop
fk: val -> flow
f1: flow
f: var
u: val -> flow
H: hprop
H0: forall r : val,
P r ->
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (defun f u;; ens_ H;; rs (fk r)) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f1
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H9: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= defun f u
H10: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= (ens_ H;; rs (let x = ens r. \[P r] in fk x))
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f1

H10: Fmap.update s1 f u, s2, h3, h2, R
|= (ens_ H;; rs (let x = ens r. \[P r] in fk x))
H8: ~ Fmap.indom s1 f
s1, s2, h3, h2, R |= f1

P: val -> Prop
fk: val -> flow
f1: flow
f: var
u: val -> flow
H: hprop
H0: forall r : val,
P r ->
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (defun f u;; ens_ H;; rs (fk r)) ->

h0: heap

H11: Fmap.update s1 f u, s2, h0, h2, R |= rs (let x = ens r. \[P r] in fk x)
H7: exists (v0 : val) (h4 : heap),
  norm v = norm v0 /\
  (\[v0 = vunit] \* H) h4 /\
  h0 = h3 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h3 h4
s1, s2, h3, h2, R |= f1

H1: P v1
H5: Fmap.disjoint (h3 \u x0) Fmap.empty
exists (v : val) (h4 : heap),
  norm ?r1 = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H) h4 /\
  ?h3 = h3 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h3 h4

    applys* s_rs_val.
Qed.

Import ExamplesEnt.Axioms.


forall (n : int) (acc : bool),
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" n
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))


forall (n : int) (acc : bool),
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" n
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

  
n: int
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" n
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
 
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" n
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))

    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,

                 \[b >= a + n /\

IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" n
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

  
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = toss_n1 n in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
 
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 =
   disj (ens r. \[r = true /\ veq n 0])
     (ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
      let r1 = toss1 vunit
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

  
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
disj
  (rs
     (let v =
      let r2 = ens r. \[r = true /\ veq n 0]
      in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0])))
  (rs
     (let v =
      let r2 =
      ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
      let r1 = toss1 vunit
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0])))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

  
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,

                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 =
   ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
   let r1 = toss1 vunit
   in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
      in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
(n > 0)%Z ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 =
   let r1 = toss1 vunit
   in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
      in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
   in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

   in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
      in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
   in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])

n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 =
   let r1 =
   sh "k"
     (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
        let r1 =
        req (x ~~> a)
          (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
        in (∀ b : int,
              let r2 =
              req (x ~~> b)
                (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
              in discard "k";;
                 (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
   in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
      in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
   in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->

  (let v =

   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))

  (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
     let r1 =

     in (∀ b : int,

⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs

   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))

   rs

      let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
      in (ens r. \[r = vand true r2])

         in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))

           (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
         in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

    
n: int
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else 
                r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If 
                    acc = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))
IH: rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n - 1 >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + (n - 1) /\
                   (If 
                    acc = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r2 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));;
rs
  (let r1 =
   rs
     (let v =
      let r2 =
      let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
      in (ens r. \[r = r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
      in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
   in (∀ b : int,
         let r2 =
         req (x ~~> b)
           (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
         in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

n: int
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else 
                r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If 
                    acc = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r2 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
req \[n - 1 >= 0]
  (rs
     (let r1 =
      ∃ b : int,
        (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                \[b >= a + 1 + (n - 1) /\
                  (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])
      in (∀ b : int,
            let r2 =
            req (x ~~> b)
              (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
            in discard "k";;
               (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2]))))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

acc: bool

   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else

      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If 
                    acc = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))

H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,

forall acc : bool,

   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else 
                r = 0]))

      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If 
                    acc = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))

  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r2 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[
      r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])

     (ens r. x ~~> b \*
             \[b >= a + 1 + (n - 1) /\
               (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])
   in (∀ b : int,
         let r2 =
         req (x ~~> b)
           (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
         in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1) ->
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =

acc: bool

x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else 
                r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])

H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r2 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])

rs
  (∀ x0 : int,
     let r =
     ens r. \[If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0]
     in let r2 =
        req (x ~~> x0)
          (ens_ (x ~~> (x0 + 1));; unk "k" false)
        in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =

                r = 1 else

      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If 
                    acc = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r2 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])

ens_ (x ~~> a1);;
rs
  (let r =
   ens r. \[If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0]
   in let r2 =
      req (x ~~> a1)
        (ens_ (x ~~> (a1 + 1));; unk "k" false)

n: int
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else 
                r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If 
                    acc = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
H2: forall (f : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
let x = req (x ~~> a1) f in fk x
⊑ req (x ~~> a1) (let x = f in fk x)
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r2 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> a1);;
rs
  (let r =
   ens r. \[If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0]
   in let r2 =
      req (x ~~> a1)
        (ens_ (x ~~> (a1 + 1));; unk "k" false)
      in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

    
n: int
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else 
                r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If 
                    acc = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
H2: forall (f : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
let x = req (x ~~> a1) f in fk x
⊑ req (x ~~> a1) (let x = f in fk x)
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r2 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> a1);;
rs
  (let r =
   ens r. \[If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0]
   in req (x ~~> a1)
        (let r2 =
         ens_ (x ~~> (a1 + 1));; unk "k" false
         in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

    
n: int
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else 
                r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If 
                    acc = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)

  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r2 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]

         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> a1);;
rs
  (let r =
   ens r. \[If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0]
   in req (x ~~> a1)
        (let r2 =
         ens_ (x ~~> (a1 + 1));; unk "k" false
         in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

n: int
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else 
                r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If 
                    acc = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
r: val
H2: If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r2 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> (a1 + 1));;
rs
  (let r2 =
   rs
     (let v =
      let r2 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = false]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
      in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
   in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

acc: bool

x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->

r: val
H2: If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0

   rs

      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> (a1 + 1));;
rs
  (let r2 =
   rs
     (let v =
      let r2 =
      let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
      in (ens r. \[r = vand false r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
      in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
   in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

  (fun v : val =>
   rs

      let r2 =

                    r = 0)]))
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r2 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[
      r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> (a1 + 1));;
rs
  (let r2 =
   rs
     (let v =
      let r2 =
      let _ = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
      in (ens r. \[r = false]) in 
      (ens r. \[r = r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
   in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[b >= a + n /\ r = 1])

acc: bool

x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
r: val
C0: True
H2: r = 1
C: acc
IH1: downto 0 (n - 1) n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else 
                r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n - 1 >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + (n - 1) /\
                   (If 
                    acc = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))

             \[b >= a1 + 1 + (n - 1) /\
               (If false = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])
   in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[b >= a + n /\ r = 1])
 
n: int
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
r: val
C0: True
H2: r = 1
C: acc
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r2 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
rs
  (let r2 =
   ∃ b : int,
     (ens r. x ~~> b \*
             \[b >= a1 + 1 + (n - 1) /\
               (If false = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])
   in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[b >= a + n /\ r = 1])

n: int
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else 
                r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If 
                    acc = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
r: val
H2: If false = true then r = 1 else r = 0
C: ~ acc
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let _ =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = false])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> (a1 + 1));;
rs
  (let r2 =
   rs
     (let v =
      let _ =
      let _ = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
      in (ens r. \[r = false])
      in (ens r. \[r = false])
      in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
   in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If false = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else 
                r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If 
                    acc = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
r: val
C0: ~ True
H2: r = 1
C: ~ acc
True
 constructor. 
n: int
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
   in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else 
                r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If 
                    acc = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
r: val
C0: True
H2: r = 0
C: ~ acc
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let _ =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = false])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> (a1 + 1));;
rs
  (let r2 =
   rs
     (let v =
      let _ =
      let _ = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
      in (ens r. \[r = false])
      in (ens r. \[r = false])
      in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
   in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[b >= a + n /\ r = 0])

      in (ens r. \[r = false])
      in (ens r. \[r = false])

n: int
acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
r: val
C0: True
H2: r = 0
C: ~ acc
IH1: rs
  (let v =
   let _ = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
   in (ens r. \[r = false])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else 
                r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n - 1 >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + (n - 1) /\
                   (If 
                    false = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let _ =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = false])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> (a1 + 1));;
rs
  (let r2 =
   rs
     (let v =
      (let _ = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
       in (ens r. \[r = false]));;
      (ens r. \[r = false])
      in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
   in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[b >= a + n /\ r = 0])

acc: bool
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
r: val
C0: True
H2: r = 0
C: ~ acc
IH1: rs
  (let v =
   let _ = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
   in (ens r. \[r = false])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then 
                r = 1 else 
                r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n - 1 >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + (n - 1) /\
                   (If 
                    false = true then 
                    r = 1 else 
                    r = 0)]))
H3: (ens r. \[r = false]);; (ens r. \[r = false])
⊑ ens r. \[r = false]
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let _ =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = false])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> (a1 + 1));;
rs
  (let r2 =
   rs
     (let v =
      unk "toss_n" (n - 1);;
      (ens r. \[r = false]);; (ens r. \[r = false])
      in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
   in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[b >= a + n /\ r = 0])

C0: True
H2: r = 0
C: ~ acc
b: int
H3: b >= a1 + 1 + (n - 1)
C1: True
ens_ (x ~~> b);; rs (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r 0])
⊑ ens r. x ~~> b \* \[b >= a + n /\ r = 0]

Qed.

End Toss.

Module Main.

Import Toss.

Definition main n : flow :=
  rs (
    bind (unk "toss_n" (vint n)) (fun v =>
    ens (fun r => \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))).


forall n : int,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
main n ⊑ ExamplesEnt.Main.main_spec_weaker n


forall n : int,
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
main n ⊑ ExamplesEnt.Main.main_spec_weaker n

  
n: int
(forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a) ->
main n ⊑ ExamplesEnt.Main.main_spec_weaker n
 
n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
main n ⊑ ExamplesEnt.Main.main_spec_weaker n
 
n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
rs
  (let v = unk "toss_n" n
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[vgt n 0])
      (∃ b : Val.value,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[vge b (vadd a n) /\ r = 1]))

  
n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
rs
  (let v = toss_n1 n
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[vgt n 0])
      (∃ b : Val.value,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[vge b (vadd a n) /\ r = 1]))
 
n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
rs
  (let v =
   disj (ens r. \[r = true /\ veq n 0])
     (ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
      let r1 = toss1 vunit
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[vgt n 0])
      (∃ b : Val.value,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[vge b (vadd a n) /\ r = 1]))

  
n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
disj
  (rs
     (let v = ens r. \[r = true /\ veq n 0]
      in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0])))
  (rs
     (let v =
      ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
      let r1 = toss1 vunit
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0])))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[vgt n 0])
      (∃ b : Val.value,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[vge b (vadd a n) /\ r = 1]))

Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
rs
  (let v =
   ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
   let r1 = toss1 vunit
   in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
      in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[vgt n 0])
      (∃ b : Val.value,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[vge b (vadd a n) /\ r = 1]))

n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
(n > 0)%Z ->
rs
  (let v =
   let r1 = toss1 vunit
   in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
      in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[(n > 0)%Z])
      (∃ b : Val.value,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1]))
 
n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
rs
  (let v =
   let r1 = toss1 vunit
   in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
      in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[(n > 0)%Z])
      (∃ b : Val.value,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1]))

    
n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
rs
  (let v =
   let r1 =
   sh "k"
     (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
        let r1 =
        req (x ~~> a)
          (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
        in (∀ b : int,
              let r2 =
              req (x ~~> b)
                (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
              in discard "k";;
                 (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
   in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
      in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
   in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[(n > 0)%Z])
      (∃ b : Val.value,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1]))

    
n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
rs
  (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
     let r1 =
     req (x ~~> a)
       (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
     in (∀ b : int,
           let r2 =
           req (x ~~> b)
             (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
           in discard "k";;
              (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[(n > 0)%Z])
      (∃ b : Val.value,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1]))

    
n: int

H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
rs
  (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
     let r1 =
     req (x ~~> a)
       (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
     in (∀ b : int,
           let r2 =
           req (x ~~> b)
             (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
           in discard "k";;
              (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∀ a : int,
    req (x ~~> a \* \[(n > 0)%Z])
      (∃ b : Val.value,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1]))

defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
rs
  (∀ a : int,
     let r1 =
     req (x ~~> a)
       (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
     in (∀ b : int,
           let r2 =
           req (x ~~> b)
             (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
           in discard "k";;
              (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))

      (∃ b : Val.value,

n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
rs
  (∀ a : int,
     let r1 =
     req (x ~~> a)
       (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
     in (∀ b : int,
           let r2 =

         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> b);;
rs
  (let r1 =
   ens r. \[If true = true then r = 1 else r = 0]
   in (∀ b : int,
         let r2 =
         req (x ~~> b)
           (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
         in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : Val.value,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])

H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: (n > 0)%Z
b: int
H1: b >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
C: True
b1: int
H2: b1 >= b + 1 + (n - 1)
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> b1);;
rs
  (let r2 =
   ens r. \[If false = true then r = 1 else r = 0]
   in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd 1 r2]))
⊑ ens r. x ~~> b1 \* \[vge b1 (a + n) /\ r = 1]

    
n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: (n > 0)%Z
b: int
H1: b >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
C: True
b1: int
H2: b1 >= b + 1 + (n - 1)
C0: True
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> b1);;
rs
  (let r2 = ens r. \[r = 0]
   in discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd 1 r2]))
⊑ ens r. x ~~> b1 \* \[vge b1 (a + n) /\ r = 1]

    
n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: (n > 0)%Z
b: int
H1: b >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
C: True
b1: int
H2: b1 >= b + 1 + (n - 1)
C0: True
defun "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])));;
ens_ (x ~~> b1);;
rs (discard "k";; (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd 1 0]))
⊑ ens r. x ~~> b1 \* \[vge b1 (a + n) /\ r = 1]

Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a

x: loc
a: int
H0: (n > 0)%Z
b: int

b1: int

n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: (n > 0)%Z
b: int
H1: b >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
C: True
b1: int
H2: b1 >= b + 1 + (n - 1)
C0: True
(fun x0 : val => \[x0 = vadd 1 0] \* x ~~> b1) ===>
(fun r : val => x ~~> b1 \* \[vge b1 (a + n) /\ r = 1])
 
n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: (n > 0)%Z
b: int
H1: b >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
C: True
b1: int
H2: b1 >= b + 1 + (n - 1)
C0: True
forall r : val,
r = vadd 1 0 -> vge b1 (a + n) /\ r = 1

H: (n > 0)%Z

a: int

b: int

forall r : val, r = 1 + 0 -> (b1 >= a + n)%Z /\ r = 1

x: loc

H1: b >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
C: True
b1: int

C0: True
r: val
H3: r = 1 + 0
(b1 >= a + n)%Z /\ r = 1
 
n: int
Htoss_n: forall a : val, unk "toss_n" a ⊑ toss_n1 a
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: (n > 0)%Z
b: int
H1: b >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
C: True
b1: int
H2: b1 >= b + 1 + (n - 1)
C0: True
r: val
H3: r = 1 + 0
(b1 >= a + n)%Z
 math.
  }
Qed.

(* undone proof for stronger lemma *)

Definition main_spec : flow :=
  ∀ x a n,
    req (x~~>vint a \* \[n > 0])
      (ens (fun r => x~~>(a + Z.pow 2 (n+1) - 2) \* \[r = 1])).


forall (acc : val) (x : loc) (n : int),
rs
  (let v = unk "toss" n
   in (ens r1. \[vand acc v = true /\ r1 = 1 \/
                 vand acc v = false /\ r1 = 0]))
⊑ ∃ a : int,
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n > 0])
      (ens r. x ~~> (a + 2 ^ (n + 1) - 2) \*
              \[acc = true /\ r = 1 \/
                acc = false /\ r = 0])


forall (acc : val) (x : loc) (n : int),
rs
  (let v = unk "toss" n
   in (ens r1. \[vand acc v = true /\ r1 = 1 \/
                 vand acc v = false /\ r1 = 0]))
⊑ ∃ a : int,
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n > 0])
      (ens r. x ~~> (a + 2 ^ (n + 1) - 2) \*
              \[acc = true /\ r = 1 \/
                acc = false /\ r = 0])

Abort.

End Main.
